T001.title: Greetings
T001.description: Tests generic/greeting messages that should route directly to FinalResponder (no specialized agent needed).
TEST_MESSAGES: What is the capital of France?

T002.title: Geospatial — Supervisor plan + confirmation
T002.description: Tests geospatial/flood messages that trigger the supervisor plan and plan-confirmation interrupt (accept / reject).
TEST_MESSAGES: Create a digital twin for Rome
Run a flood simulation for this area

T003.title: Retriever subgraph — data retrieval
T003.description: Tests messages that should route through the retriever subgraph (DataRetrieverAgent → InvocationConfirm → Executor). Covers DPC and Meteoblue tool selection.
TEST_MESSAGES: Retrieve the latest DPC rainfall radar for northern Italy
Get the Meteoblue precipitation forecast for Rome for the next 24 hours
Download temperature forecast for Milan bbox 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-02

T004.title: Models subgraph — flood simulation
T004.description: Tests messages that should route through the models subgraph (ModelsAgent → InvocationConfirm → Executor). Covers SaferRain flood simulation.
TEST_MESSAGES: Run a SaferRain flood simulation for Rome with 50mm/h rainfall
Simulate flood propagation for a heavy-rain scenario on the Po valley

T005.title: Supervisor — plan rejection and replan
T005.description: Tests the plan rejection flow: user rejects the proposed plan and the supervisor replans based on feedback.
TEST_MESSAGES: Run a flood simulation and retrieve rainfall data for Milan
no, only do the flood simulation without retrieving data
Show me available raster layers and run a flood model

T007.title: Map Agent — viewport, symbology, create shape, register shape
T007.description: Tests the MapAgent: MoveMapViewTool (move viewport to a named location), LayerSymbologyTool (restyle a layer), CreateShapeTool (generate a bbox from a place name), RegisterShapeTool (register a user-drawn shape). Full standalone test in tests/T007_map_agent.py.
TEST_MESSAGES: Colora il layer flood con una palette blu-rosso
Crea una bbox attorno a Milano
Registra la shape che ho disegnato
